examples:
Command Example
#
#### Human Readable Output
### gitlab-projects-deny-access
***
Denies an access request for the given user.
#### Base Command
`gitlab-projects-deny-access`

outputs.description: Access Request ID GitLab.AccessRequests.username Access Request User
outputs.name: GitLab.AccessRequests.id

outputs.description: Access Request Create Time GitLab.AccessRequests.state Access Request State
outputs.name: GitLab.AccessRequests.requested_at
